steps.title: Recognize the zero product property
steps.content: When a product of factors equals zero, at least one of the factors must equal zero. Here we have $x(x - 1)(x + 7) = 0$ with three factors.

steps.title: Set each factor to zero and identify the matching choice
steps.content:
Setting each factor equal to zero:
  • $x = 0$
  • $x - 1 = 0 \Rightarrow x = 1$
  • $x + 7 = 0 \Rightarrow x = -7$
The solutions are $0, 1, -7$. Among the choices, $x = 0$ appears as choice B — B is correct.
